company.name: Spotify
company.notes: Music + audio creative. Sponsors. No TLV office known. Brand-strong.

research.status_summary: Spotify is in active cost-cutting / restructuring mode — with a major 17% workforce reduction in late 2023, a smaller podcast-division trim in March 2026, and new co-CEOs leading a strategic pivot toward AI-generated audio products unveiled at its May 2026 Investor Day.
research.hiring_policy: Spotify actively sponsors H-1B visas (filed 47 LCAs in FY2026) and maintains its 'Work From Anywhere' policy allowing employees to work remotely from any country where Spotify has a legal entity — no known EOR friction, but sponsorship volume has dropped significantly from 139 LCAs in FY2025, suggesting a tighter hiring pace.
recent_news: May 21, 2026 — Spotify held its first Investor Day in four years, unveiling a 'Large Taste Model,' a 2030 roadmap targeting 1 billion subscribers and $100B in revenue, and a landmark licensing deal with Universal Music Group to let Premium users create AI-powered covers and remixes of songs.
March 24, 2026 — Spotify laid off ~15 employees (~3% of its podcasting division), affecting Spotify Studios and The Ringer, as part of an internal restructure aimed at reducing management layers.
Q1 2026 financials (SEC filing) — Spotify hit a Q1 record gross margin of 33.0%, operating income of €715M, and 761M monthly active users (12% YoY growth), beating guidance on all key metrics.
research.growth_signal: Despite a ~25% stock decline YTD, Spotify's fundamentals are accelerating — 761M MAUs, 293M Premium subscribers, €4.5B quarterly revenue, and a bold AI-monetization strategy position it for platform expansion rather than contraction.
research.fit_for_lior: Spotify is a near-perfect fit for Lior's Creative AI thread — the UMG generative remix deal, the Large Taste Model, ElevenLabs audiobook narration partnership, and AI DJ features all demand Product Analysts and creative-AI thinkers who can sit at the intersection of music, UX, and responsible AI; WFA policy and confirmed visa sponsorship make it practically accessible too.
